result.title: Nintendo Music
result.description:
With the Nintendo Music app, you can listen to soundtracks from Nintendo Entertainment System to Nintendo Switch 2 in one convenient place.
A Nintendo Switch Online membership is required to use this app.

◆ Featuring music from games like:
・ Mario Kart World
・ Pikmin 4
・ The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom
・ Fire Emblem Engage
・ Pokémon Scarlet and Pokémon Violet
・ Pokémon FireRed Version and Pokémon LeafGreen Version
・ Splatoon 3
・ Kirby and the Forgotten Land
・ Animal Crossing: New Horizons
・ Super Mario Odyssey
・ Mario Kart 8 Deluxe
・ Super Mario Galaxy
・ Wii Sports
・ Metroid Prime
・ The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time
・ Donkey Kong Country
・ Super Mario Bros.
...and more!
Note: New soundtracks are added periodically.

◆ Play music in the background
You can keep playing music when the screen is off or when you're using other apps.

◆ Listen offline
Download tracks and enjoy them even when you're not connected to the internet.

◆ Block spoilers
You can choose to block spoilers, for example for games you haven't played or finished yet. Tracks from games you've chosen to block spoilers for won't be shown or played.

◆ Extended playback
You can extend the length of a supported track to keep listening to it, for example when you're working or studying!
Tracks can be extended to 5, 10, 15, 30 or 60 minutes.

◆ Play based on current time
For some Animal Crossing playlists, tracks can be played to match the current time of day wherever you are.

◆ Playlists
You can organise your favourite tracks into playlists. A variety of pre-made playlists are also available, including character-specific playlists, playlists designed for relaxing and more.

◆ Android Auto
Nintendo Music supports Android Auto on your car's display.

---

● A Nintendo Switch Online membership is required to use this app.
● A Nintendo Account is required.
● Android version 9.0 or higher is required to use this app.

Nintendo Account Agreement: https://accounts.nintendo.com/term_chooser/eula

© Nintendo

result.summary: Enjoy Nintendo game soundtracks - anytime, anywhere!
result.developerLegalAddress: 11-1, KAMITOBAHOKODATECHO, MINAMI-KU, KYOTO, 京都府 601-8116, Japan
result.recentChanges: We've fixed some issues to allow for a smoother experience when using this app.
